name: ExtensionSchedule_Name
title: R5: Human-readable label (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Schedule.name` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Schedule.name` 0..1 `string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Schedule.name` 0..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Schedule.name` has a context of Schedule based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Schedule`.
Element `Schedule.name` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `Schedule.name` has a context of Schedule based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Schedule`.
Element `Schedule.name` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
This MAY be used to describe what the schedule is for where it is clearer than just the name of the single actor.

element.definition: Further description of the schedule as it would be presented to a consumer while searching.
element.comment: This MAY be used to describe what the schedule is for where it is clearer than just the name of the single actor.
